message:
feat(http/h1): add body size limit protection against DoS

Add safeguards against oversized HTTP bodies:

- DEFAULT_MAX_BODY_SIZE constant (16 MiB) to prevent memory exhaustion
- HttpError::BodyTooLarge variant for clear error reporting
- Display impl for human-readable error message

This prevents denial-of-service attacks where malicious clients send
unbounded body content to exhaust server memory. The 16 MiB default
balances typical API payload sizes with resource protection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
